title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: Moderation review completed. Actions taken: banned spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels), banned toxic_runner (targeted harassment of newcomers), warned bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation in help channels). Reports on trusted_helper (dispute), new_member_17 (formatting), and core_maintainer (brigading false positive) were closed with no action. Community safety remains a priority — please continue reporting violations.
